body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

essentially right and he's basically saying we should limit it to one thing only um for that it would be better to have more audience so with the very limited amount of participants here right now um the problem of like uh What uh how would browsers basically implement this I guess like a a specific client uh could easily add support for another URL schema uh but for browsers it might be a because the the amount of overhead to get that done is not going to be insignificant okay fair enough yeah I was surprised that someone from the HTTP group basically said like why not because I phrased that something like that that that's something where people warned us of and then one of the answers was like why not um but yeah um but yeah so like um yeah I don't know we can uh or should wait for the um Sergio yeah the one question regarding I mean I know that in the past there was some concerns about the viability of the working group yeah and I mean do we have any kind of deadline or do we need to because I know that in the past we were ER I mean it was uh we were kind in the danger of being ER the report includes being closed or something like that so I mean so what I can say is I think that if we're stuck and not progressing then that heightens the concern about closure um if we if we decide to move out on um incorporating the server side offer and we get a new co-author then we're good but if we can't identify someone else who's going to take this across the Finish Line then unfortunately I think it all just falls down so I think that often times necessity breeds invention and people show up to get things done hopefully so if there's somebody out there who really wants this to happen I think someone will step forward um that's at least the the feeling I've I've gotten so there's there's not there's not a deadline on back our new ad is sitting here Mike he's not he hasn't he has not yet leaned on me and said you know you shall get this done by xate but stuck like we could flip a coin we didn't do that luckily we actually got some you know actual useful input so I think if we um we go forward and we can identify another co-author um who's got Cycles then I think it's possible we can we can get this done and I'm it shouldn't I'm hoping it shouldn't take all that long it's all right I guess the other is that uh definitely going forward um do the
